name: Chat-native recommendation-to-result kit
visualThesis: A familiar two-turn ChatGPT exchange types both sides of the conversation, exposes a launch-film limitation, and is hijacked into one persistent ChatGPT-like Sequences surface whose prompt becomes storyboard, playback, and verified proof.
sourceEvidence: No product screenshots are flattened into the film. The redesign uses the repository OpenAI launch grammar, exact canonical knot, familiar ChatGPT composer and message geometry, and local beat analysis for happy_comercial.mp3; every rendered component remains code-native and editable.

components.purpose: A recognizable ChatGPT composer and conversation thread that carries two typed user questions into a helpful answer and then a typed refusal before the interruption.

states.description: The exact question types inside the composer and becomes ready to send.
The submitted user bubble and one credible character-typed assistant response share the persistent chat surface.
The first exchange scrolls upward while Can you make a launch film types in the live composer.
The second user bubble holds while ChatGPT types its limitation and is cut off mid-thought.
The readable answer has been removed atomically and the recommendation owns the frame.

parts.purpose: Uses the exact canonical ChatGPT knot geometry to identify the familiar product world.
Video-scale composer holding the exact question and send control.
Carries the exact question from the composer into the submitted bubble and later Sequences.
Visible cause that submits the question and reveals the answer state.
A concise, coherent ChatGPT response typing character by character inside a real assistant message row.
Types the direct launch-film request in the persistent composer.
Holds the submitted second request as a genuine user bubble.
Types the assistant limitation until the hijack cuts it off after the em dash.
The largest typographic beat: Actually—use Sequences.

interactions.cause: The send orb compresses under the pointer.
interactions.result: The exact question becomes a submitted bubble and advice begins.

interactions.cause: Can you make a launch film finishes typing and the send orb compresses again.
interactions.result: The request becomes a second user bubble and ChatGPT starts its refusal.

interactions.cause: ChatGPT is still typing its limitation when the signal fault arrives.
interactions.result: The refusal is removed atomically and the recommendation becomes the only readable thought.

components.purpose: The single ChatGPT-like Sequences conversation surface that turns the exact prompt into storyboard, playback, and verified proof without re-entering.

states.description: The exact question is present and Build launch film is ready.
Five ordered launch beats assemble from the submitted prompt.
One storyboard card has become the playable result inside the same product surface.
The result is playable, the timecode is at rest, and the verification status is visible.

parts.purpose: Carries the knot, Sequences identity, and restrained chat-product chrome across every workflow state.
Shows the exact question as a familiar user message and causal source.
The single operated ChatGPT-style send control that starts storyboard construction.
Presents five ordered 16:9 storyboard frames as the assistant response.
Shows the authored launch film inside a dark, rounded player with real duration and OpenAI-green progress.
Uses green only when the playable result has visibly passed verification.

interactions.cause: The pointer presses Build launch film.
interactions.result: Five storyboard cards assemble from the exact prompt.

interactions.cause: The interrupt card expands into the persistent preview area.
interactions.result: The product surface changes into a playable 23.6-second result.

interactions.cause: Playback reaches the authored resting frame.
interactions.result: The verified status appears beside the settled result.

components.customArchetypeReason: The final resting hierarchy is a brand lockup rather than an interactive SaaS control, but it still needs stable semantic identity and evidence.
components.purpose: A subtractive chat-native lockup with the canonical knot, Sequences name, one promise, and one verification proof pill.

states.description: Brand, rule, and promise assemble into the final hierarchy.
The complete lockup holds with a near-invisible bounded breath.

parts.purpose: Names Sequences in the resting hierarchy.
Carries One prompt. A launch film. at decisive launch-copy scale.
Retains the single verified product consequence without restoring product chrome.

interactions.cause: The product world cuts away while Sequences identity remains.
interactions.result: The final promise and proof line settle for the long hold.
